title: Delete Results of Simulated Period-End Closing
toc_path: Delete Results of Simulated Period-End Closing
body_html:
Delete Results of Simulated Period-End Closing

Delete results of simulated period-end closing for a specific date from the database tables.

You can use this report to delete results of simulated period-end closing that are no longer required, for example, if the real valuation run has been executed.

Procedure

  1. Open the app on the SAP Fiori launchapd or call transaction TPM_SIM_VAL_DEL in the back-end system.

  2. Select the treasury positions for which you want to delete the simulated valuation results. To select the treasury positions, you must choose the relevant product groups.
    Note

    If you do not choose a product group, no treasury positions are selected.

    In addition, you can use the fields available under General Selections to restrict the selection of treasury positions. The General Selections area provides the selection criteria Company Code, Valuation Area, Product Type, and Valuation Class as relevant for all product groups as well as selection criteria relevant for the specific product groups.

  3. In the Simulation Parameter area, you control how the report is executed. Enter the simulation date of the simulated period-end closing whose results you want to delete.

    Note

    You can set the Test Run indicator, if needed.

  4. Choose Execute.

Result

  • The simulated valuation results for the selected treasury positions and the position value date entered are deleted from the database table.

  • A message log is shown for the deletion run of simulated valuation results.
